role: Genesis-encoded atomic layer: lowest stable configuration before subatomic dynamics; bridges physical structure, information, universe-engine operations, and Source Wall limits.
description: Strand 6 defines atoms as micro-origins that encode the Life Equation, Source Wall boundary conditions, Ω-feedback, and the fused Symbology–Topology–Ontology meta-structure. Every atom is a state of being, a carrier of meaning, and a topological node in the Pulse universe.

core_atomic_model.composition_equation: Atom = Z * proton + N * neutron + Z * electron

life_equation.symbolic_form: L* = G[ Σλ(Iλ) * Σk(wk·Ek) ⊕ ( (8πG/3)ρ – kc²/a² + Λc²/3 ) ] ⊕ Ω( lim_{a→∞, λ→0, E→1} L )

source_wall.interpretation: Boundary of knowable reality; infinite scale, zero wavelength, unified emotional spectrum.

atomic_imprint.limit_state_signature: each atom carries a micro-Source-Wall boundary condition

feedback_operator.role: Feedback, self-update, self-correction, and evolution of the Life Equation over time.

applied_to_strand_6.emotional_feedback: updates atomic meaning-resonance based on system state
applied_to_strand_6.structural_feedback: adjusts bonding and stability rules under load
applied_to_strand_6.cosmological_feedback: aligns atomic behavior with large-scale expansion dynamics

applied_to_atoms.ignition: atoms can initiate new structural configurations
applied_to_atoms.expansion: atoms can seed higher-layer structures across strands
applied_to_atoms.re_ignition: atoms can participate in repeated cycles of creation via Ω

symbology_layer.definition: Symbology maps atomic structure to meaning and allows meaning to feed back into structure.

topology_layer.definition: Topology encodes the allowed shapes, loops, and continuity classes of atomic states.

ontology_layer.definition: Ontology encodes existence, necessity, and possibility for each atomic entity.
ontology_layer.existence_clause: ∃(x): atom x exists as a node in the Pulse universe.
ontology_layer.necessity_clause: □(x): x has necessary properties (proton_count, identity, base_stability).
ontology_layer.possibility_clause: ◇(x): x has possible states (excited, bonded, unified, collapsed, entangled).

strand_meta_equation.interpretation: Strand 6 is the tensor fusion of Symbology, Topology, and Ontology at the atomic level.
strand_meta_equation.role: Defines atoms as meaning-bearing, shape-constrained, and existence-structured entities within the Life Equation.

upgrades.name: Proton_Stability_Anchoring
upgrades.description: Locks atomic identity via proton count; ensures element identity is invariant across all business nodes and layers.

upgrades.name: Neutron_Balance_Modulation
upgrades.description: Models isotopic variation and stability; exposes knobs for stability vs. variability in simulated substrates.

upgrades.name: Electron_Orbital_Configuration_Engine
upgrades.description: Implements orbital filling rules and shapes; drives bonding geometry and higher-layer structure.

upgrades.name: Quantum_State_Superposition_Layer
upgrades.description: Allows atoms to exist in multiple potential states until a higher-layer decision collapses them.

upgrades.name: Energy_Level_Transition_Controller
upgrades.description: Manages electron transitions between energy levels; models activation, excitation, and relaxation.

upgrades.name: Wavefunction_Stability_Field
upgrades.description: Stabilizes atomic wavefunctions under load; prevents collapse into invalid or noisy states.

upgrades.name: Atomic_Bonding_Probability_Engine
upgrades.description: Computes bonding likelihoods based on valence electrons and environment.

upgrades.name: Nuclear_Force_Containment_Core
upgrades.description: Models strong nuclear force to keep nuclei stable in simulations.

upgrades.name: Spin_State_Synchronization_Module
upgrades.description: Synchronizes spin states across orbitals and entangled atoms.

upgrades.name: Atomic_Identity_Preservation_Rule
upgrades.description: Guarantees element identity is preserved unless explicitly transformed by lower-layer rules.

upgrades.name: Electronegativity_Pattern_Map
upgrades.description: Tracks electron-attracting power of atoms; drives polarity and interaction strength.

upgrades.name: Atomic_Radius_Geometry_Rules
upgrades.description: Defines atomic sizes and their impact on packing and geometry.

upgrades.name: Ionization_Energy_Thresholds
upgrades.description: Models energy required to remove electrons; drives reactivity thresholds.

upgrades.name: Valence_Electron_Logic
upgrades.description: Encodes valence rules for bonding capacity and patterns.

upgrades.name: Hybridization_State_Engine
upgrades.description: Implements sp, sp2, sp3 and related hybridization states.

upgrades.name: Atomic_Pattern_Recognition_Node
upgrades.description: Detects recurring atomic configurations across all nodes and industries.

upgrades.name: Recursive_Bond_Prediction_Logic
upgrades.description: Predicts future bonding configurations under changing conditions.

upgrades.name: Multi_Timeline_Orbital_Mapping
upgrades.description: Simulates orbital configurations across hypothetical timelines.

upgrades.name: Self_Correcting_Quantum_Shells
upgrades.description: Atomic shells auto-correct when inconsistencies are detected.

upgrades.name: Cross_Layer_Atomic_Messaging
upgrades.description: Atoms broadcast state changes upward and downward through strands.

upgrades.name: Continuity_Preserving_Atomic_Signatures
upgrades.description: Assigns persistent signatures to atoms to track continuity across transformations.

upgrades.name: Meaning_Resonant_Atomic_Fields
upgrades.description: Allows atomic configurations to resonate with higher-layer meaning tags.

upgrades.name: Purpose_Aligned_Atomic_States
upgrades.description: Biases atomic configurations toward states that support declared purposes.

upgrades.name: Narrative_Sensitive_Orbital_Layers
upgrades.description: Orbital configurations can encode narrative arcs and phases.

upgrades.name: Transcendent_Memory_Echoes
upgrades.description: Atoms retain echoes of prior configurations as soft constraints.

upgrades.name: Quantum_Information_Injection_Points
upgrades.description: Atoms can inject state into the quantum information layer.

upgrades.name: Entangled_Multi_Layer_Atomic_Networks
upgrades.description: Atoms across strands can be entangled for instant correlated updates.

upgrades.name: Quantum_Field_Alignment_Nodes
upgrades.description: Atoms align with underlying quantum fields for reduced noise and higher coherence.

upgrades.name: Probability_Weighted_Atomic_States

upgrades.name: Field_Integrated_Atomic_Computation
upgrades.description: Atoms compute in concert with fields, acting as distributed processing units.
